ddls:
CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor (e.g., Dental, Cardiology) */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree of the doctor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the doctor */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the doctor is associated with */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the doctor (e.g., full-time, part-time, on leave) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the specialty was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the specialty information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "primary_doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient's primary doctor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "blood_group" TEXT /* Blood group of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor for the appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty for the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the appointment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the appointment was last updated */,
  "reason_for_visit" TEXT /* Reason for the patient's visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the appointment */,
  "appointment_location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment within the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment associated with the bill */,
  "service_provided" TEXT /* Description of the service provided */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the service */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, insurance) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "balance_due" REAL /* Remaining balance due on the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the medical record was created */,
  "record_description" TEXT /* Description of the medical record */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who created the medical record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the medical record was last updated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to any attached medical documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the insurance provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the insurance provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the provider was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the provider information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, administrative staff, patient) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user information was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the message has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
